overall.description: A first-person perspective walkthrough of a cyberpunk night market in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring neon-lit food stalls with skewers and bottles, a seated character drinking, and bustling pedestrian activity under red paper lanterns and glowing signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered food stall counter with skewers and bottles

events.description: camera slows slightly while examining the food items displayed on the counter
steam rising from the hot food temporarily obscures part of the view

agents.ego_description: walking along the food stall counter examining grilled skewers and beer bottles on the metal surface

entered.detail: metal counter surface displaying food items and beverages
metal tray filled with grilled meat skewers emitting steam
several beer bottles lined up along the counter edge
traditional red paper lanterns hanging overhead in a row
glowing neon signs and holographic displays in the background

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered food stall counter in a cyberpunk night market, with grilled skewers and beer bottles displayed on the metal surface. Red paper lanterns hang overhead while neon signs glow in the background, and steam rises from the hot food.

scene_state.functional_zone: seating area at the end of a food stall

events.description: camera turns right to focus on a seated character at the end of the stall
seated character raises a beer bottle and takes a drink

agents.ego_description: turning to observe a seated character at the end of the food stall

notable_agents.action: sitting in a blue plastic chair drinking from a beer bottle

entered.detail: character with spiky hair wearing a light blue tank top and shorts
simple blue plastic chair placed on cardboard
brown guitar case leaning against the wall
chain link fence behind the seating area

segments.scene_description: Turning to focus on a seated NPC at the end of the stall, who is sitting in a blue plastic chair and takes a drink from a bottle. The area is partially enclosed with a metal fence and guitar case visible nearby, transitioning from the covered counter to a more open seating area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cyberpunk night market street with multiple vendors

events.description: moving from the sheltered stall area into the open market street
passing through a narrow doorway between structures with people standing nearby

agents.ego_description: walking away from the stall into the bustling market street, passing other pedestrians and vendors

notable_agents.action: two women standing near a doorway conversing

entered.detail: open street with various market stalls and neon lighting
narrow passage between buildings with people standing nearby
yellow awning of the food stall viewed from the exterior

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the stall into the open market street, revealing the yellow canopy from the outside and bustling pedestrian activity. The camera passes through a narrow doorway area where two women are conversing, entering the broader neon-lit market thoroughfare.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins within the intimate confines of a food stall and expands into the bustling energy of a neon-lit night market. It begins by gliding along a metal counter laden with grilled skewers and beer bottles, where steam rises beneath a canopy of red paper lanterns and glowing signs. As the camera reaches the end of the stall, the perspective shifts to focus on a seated figure drinking from a bottle in a blue plastic chair beside a metal fence and a guitar case. The scene then opens up as the camera moves away from the seating area, passing under a yellow canopy and through a narrow doorway where two women are conversing. Finally, the movement carries the viewer out into the broader market thoroughfare, revealing a wide, vibrant street filled with pedestrian activity and towering neon lights.
